sequenceDiagram participant awf as Agent Workflow participant sthd as Steps Handler
(Infra_EtcdCluster) participant csthd as Steps Handler
(Infra_IngressController) participant xyzhd as APT Handler
SWUpdate Handler
Script Handler
Steps Handler, etc. participant comenum as Component Enumerator Note over awf, sthd : Note: Simplified diagram
Extension Manager is hidden awf-->>+sthd: loads handler
for Parent Update
(Infra_LoadBalancer) awf->>+sthd: 'download' loop foreach step Note over sthd, csthd : Note: For demo purposes,
all Parent's step are 'Reference Step' sthd-->>csthd: loads handler
for Child Update
(Infra_RedisCache) sthd->>+csthd: 'download' loop foreach step csthd-->>xyzhd: loads handler
for {Infra_IngressController} csthd->>+xyzhd: 'download' xyzhd->>xyzhd: performs
download task xyzhd-->>-csthd: returns ADUC_Result end csthd-->>-sthd: returns ADUC_Result end sthd->>-awf: return ADUC_Result awf->>+sthd: 'install' Note over sthd, comenum : Note: Enumerate compatible component.
If Component Enuemrator is not available, the following loop will be process only once,
and assumed target is a Host Device. sthd->>+comenum: 'select components' comenum-->>-sthd: returns 'selected components' loop for each selected component sthd->>sthd: sets current component
as Child Workflow's selectedComponents Note over sthd, xyzhd: For each component, perform every step in sequence.
All steps must be completed successfully before continue with the next component. loop for each step sthd-->>csthd: loads handler
for Child Update
(Infra_EtcdCluster) Note over sthd, xyzhd: For each step, perform both 'install' and 'apply' task
to ensure that an Update is installed and applied onto
current component, before move on to the next one. sthd->>+csthd: 'install' loop foreach step csthd-->>xyzhd: loads handler
for {Infra_LoadBalancer} csthd->>+xyzhd: 'install' xyzhd->>xyzhd: performs
install task Note over xyzhd,csthd: Note: a device or DU Agent restart request can be encoded
in ADUC_Result if needed. xyzhd-->>-csthd: returns ADUC_Result end csthd-->>-sthd: returns ADUC_Result sthd->>+csthd: 'apply' loop foreach step csthd-->>xyzhd: loads handler
for {Infra_LoadBalancer} csthd->>+xyzhd: 'apply' xyzhd->>xyzhd: performs
apply task Note over xyzhd,csthd: Note: a device or DU Agent restart request can be encoded
in ADUC_Result if needed. xyzhd-->>-csthd: returns ADUC_Result end csthd-->>-sthd: returns ADUC_Result end end sthd->>-awf: return ADUC_Result awf->>+sthd: 'apply' loop foreach step Note over sthd, csthd : Note: For demo purposes,
all Parent's step are 'Reference Step' sthd-->>csthd: loads handler
for Child Update
(Infra_LoadBalancer) sthd->>+csthd: 'apply' Note over csthd : Since 'apply' task was completed as part of 'install' above,
always return success here. csthd-->>-sthd: returns ADUC_Result end sthd->>-awf: return ADUC_Result
repo_description: Device Update for IoT Hub agent

cscw_dialogue.utterance: 我们需要画一个Agent Workflow的序列图，展示Parent Update和Child Update的完整生命周期。核心参与者包括Agent Workflow、Steps Handler、APT Handler，还有Component Enumerator。整个流程要覆盖download、install、apply三个阶段。
明白了。我注意到Steps Handler需要区分Parent和Child层级——比如Parent Update对应Infra_LoadBalancer，Child Update对应Infra_RedisCache或Infra_EtcdCluster。另外APT Handler那里似乎有多个具体实现，比如SWUpdate Handler、Script Handler等，我需要把它们合并展示吗？
对，Parent和Child的区分很重要。APT Handler那里确实有多种实现，但为简化起见，我们把它们合并成一个xyz handler节点，标注清楚包含哪些类型就行。还有，记得在图上加个说明：Extension Manager被隐藏了，这是简化版。
好的，我先画出主流程：Agent Workflow启动后，向Steps Handler发送'download'指令，然后进入foreach step循环。在循环内部，Steps Handler会加载Child Update的handler，比如Infra_RedisCache对应的handler，再递归地向更底层的handler发送'download'。这个结构对吗？
结构是对的。但install阶段有个关键点：Steps Handler需要先调用Component Enumerator做组件枚举。如果Component Enumerator不可用，就默认只执行一次，假设目标是Host Device。这个逻辑要在图上用注释说明清楚。

我注意到install阶段有个嵌套循环：外层是for each selected component，内层是for each step，而且每个step都要先执行install再执行apply。注释里还要说明"All steps must be completed successfully before continue with the next component"——这个顺序关系我画成三层嵌套loop可以吗？
三层嵌套是对的。还有个小细节：apply阶段其实有个优化——因为install阶段已经完成了apply任务，所以Child Update的handler在这里直接返回success就行。需要在图上标注"Since 'apply' task was completed as part of 'install' above, always return success here"。

完成了。我检查了所有ADUC_Result的返回路径：底层handler执行完任务后返回给Child handler，Child handler再返回给Parent handler，最后Parent handler返回给Agent Workflow。另外，我在几个关键位置加了关于device restart request可能编码在ADUC_Result中的注释。整个图现在覆盖了download、install、apply三个完整阶段。
